content.text: Let me find the mobile nav link component and update the gallery icon.
Now I'll replace the Gallery icon (lines 68-74) with the new palette SVG.

content.content: The file C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\mobileNavLink\MobileNavLink.jsx has been updated successfully.

content.text: Done. The Gallery nav link icon has been replaced with the palette/color wheel SVG. It uses `activeColor`/`inactiveColor` via the `fill` prop to match the other icons' active state behavior.
